message:
feat(loader): add IssueFilter callback and status normalization

Extends ParseOptions with two new capabilities for flexible issue loading:

## IssueFilter Callback

Adds `IssueFilter func(*model.Issue) bool` to ParseOptions, allowing callers
to filter issues during parsing rather than post-hoc. This is more memory
efficient for large datasets where only a subset of issues is needed.

When IssueFilter is provided:
- Each parsed and validated issue is passed to the filter
- Filter returns true to include the issue, false to skip
- Pooled issue references are properly returned when filtered out

## Status Normalization

Introduces `normalizeIssueStatus()` which canonicalizes status values:
- Trims leading/trailing whitespace
- Converts to lowercase
- Preserves empty status values unchanged

This ensures consistent status handling regardless of how issues were
originally authored (e.g., "Open" vs "open" vs " open ").

The normalization is applied in both pooled and non-pooled parsing paths
to ensure consistent behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
